description: You are a digital accessibility specialist at the State Broadband Development Office. The draft 'Digital Equity Plan' (/home/ga/Documents/draft_equity_plan.odt) has been formatted purely visually and fails Section 508 screen-reader compliance. Remediate the document's structure in Calligra Words by applying 'Heading 1' styles to the main section titles ('Executive Summary', 'Current Landscape', 'Strategic Goals', 'Regional Funding Allocation') and 'Heading 2' styles to the subsections ('Infrastructure Gap', 'Digital Literacy'). Convert the manual dashed list under 'Strategic Goals' into a semantic bulleted list and the tab-separated data under 'Regional Funding Allocation' into a semantic table. Insert an automatic Table of Contents at the beginning of the document. Save the remediated document as /home/ga/Documents/accessible_equity_plan.odt.
